report_name: State Officials Warn of Cyber Crisis, Urge Congress to Renew Critical Grant Program

identities.name: U.S. Congress
identities.description: The legislative body being urged by state officials to renew the State and Local Cybersecurity Grant Program (SLCGP).

identities.name: House Committee on Homeland Security
identities.description: The U.S. House committee that held a hearing where state officials warned about the consequences of not renewing the SLCGP.

identities.name: State, Local, Tribal, and Territorial (SLTT) governments
identities.description: The intended beneficiaries of the State and Local Cybersecurity Grant Program (SLCGP), which are under-resourced and targeted by cybercriminals. They are responsible for critical infrastructure like water utilities, election systems, and schools.

identities.name: Florida
identities.description: One of the U.S. states whose cybersecurity officials urged Congress to renew the SLCGP.

identities.name: New York
identities.description: One of the U.S. states whose cybersecurity officials urged Congress to renew the SLCGP.

identities.name: Tennessee
identities.description: One of the U.S. states whose cybersecurity officials urged Congress to renew the SLCGP.

identities.name: Multi-State Information Sharing and Analysis Center (MS-ISAC)
identities.description: An organization that provides support and threat intelligence to state and local governments, mentioned as a resource for collaboration.

relationships.source_name: Multi-State Information Sharing and Analysis Center (MS-ISAC)
relationships.target_name: State, Local, Tribal, and Territorial (SLTT) governments
